summary: Comprehensive testing of FitMaxPro Routines (Warm-Up & Stretching) features completed. All backend API endpoints tested with 18/18 pytest tests passing. Frontend WorkoutDetailPage verified with Warm-Up, Main Workout, and Stretching sections. Admin Panel Routines tab working with full exercise CRUD functionality.
passed_tests: Backend: GET /api/routines/warmup?language=fr - Returns 8 warmup exercises
Backend: GET /api/routines/warmup?language=en - Returns English warmup
Backend: GET /api/routines/stretching?language=fr - Returns 10 stretching exercises
Backend: GET /api/routines/stretching?language=en - Returns English stretching
Backend: GET /api/routines/invalid - Returns 400 for invalid type
Backend: GET /api/admin/routines - Returns all 4 routines (warmup_fr, warmup_en, stretching_fr, stretching_en)
Backend: PUT /api/admin/routines/{id}/exercises/{index} - Updates exercise successfully
Backend: POST /api/admin/routines/{id}/exercises - Adds exercise successfully
Backend: DELETE /api/admin/routines/{id}/exercises/{index} - Deletes exercise successfully
Backend: Admin endpoints return 401 without auth
Backend: POST /api/routine/start?routine_type=warmup - Starts warmup session
Backend: POST /api/routine/end?session_id={id}&completed=true - Ends session with duration
Backend: POST /api/routine/start?routine_type=stretching - Starts stretching session
Backend: Session endpoints return 401 without auth
Frontend: WorkoutDetailPage shows START WARM-UP button on workout image
Frontend: WorkoutDetailPage shows Warm-Up collapsible section (8 exercises • 5-7 minutes)
Frontend: WorkoutDetailPage shows MAIN WORKOUT section with exercises
Frontend: WorkoutDetailPage shows Stretching section (10 exercises • 5-10 minutes)
Frontend: Starting warmup shows session timer bar at top with FINISH WARM-UP button
Frontend: Warm-Up exercises expand to show exercise details with images and Watch Video buttons
Frontend: Admin Panel Warm-Up/Stretching tab shows all 4 routines
Frontend: Admin routine expansion shows all exercises with Edit/Delete buttons
Frontend: Admin Add Exercise form has all fields (name, duration, description, image URL, video URL)
critical_code_review_comments: Routines data correctly seeded with 4 routines (warmup_fr, warmup_en, stretching_fr, stretching_en)
Resend email API uses demo key (re_demo_key) - MOCKED integration, real emails won't send
WorkoutDetailPage.js implements proper timer tracking with pause/resume functionality

success_rate.frontend: 100% (All WorkoutDetailPage and Admin Routines features verified)

seed_data_creation: Routines already seeded: warmup_fr (8 exercises), warmup_en (8 exercises), stretching_fr (10 exercises), stretching_en (10 exercises)
context_for_next_testing_agent: All routines endpoints working. WorkoutDetailPage has Warm-Up, Main Workout, and Stretching sections with session tracking. Admin Panel has Warm-Up/Stretching tab for managing routines. Resend email API is MOCKED with demo key.

mocked_apis.resend_email: Uses demo key 're_demo_key' - emails won't actually send but API structure is correct

features_verified.warmup_routines: GET /api/routines/warmup returns exercises with name, description, duration, image_url, video_url
features_verified.admin_routine_management: Full CRUD for exercise management via admin endpoints
features_verified.frontend_workout_detail: Three sections: Warm-Up, Main Workout, Stretching with timers
features_verified.admin_routines_tab: Lists all routines with expand/collapse, edit/delete per exercise, add new exercise form
